text:
There once was a young squirrel named Sandy. She loved to climb trees.

One afternoon, Sandy discovered an old, rusty tin can. She opened it, and discovered worms inside!

She carried them home, fed them some fresh leafy things she found, and soon had a little worm colony growing.

Every day, she'd sing while they ate: "Oh, wormy worms, you're my favorite!"

Soon she had a big garden full of worms.

You could say her little worm friends became her pets. She would feed them crickets, maybe a little apple slice now and then.

One day, she heard a strange noise...

Maybe a wild cat?

No! Birds!

They were calling her names.

Sandy danced around. Birds!

Oh! A red squirrel.

That must have been a mom.

She thought, maybe I'll teach them to sing?

So each day, she'd hop up there and sing.

One day, a black hole appeared.

All her birds disappeared!

S
